Localization.Description: A user created a new user

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.application.account.name} created new user {object.application.account.name} while working in Designer mode on host {event_src.host}
A user created new user {object.application.account.name} with privileges "{object.application.account.privileges}" while working in Designer mode on host {event_src.host}

User {subject.application.account.name} created new user {object.application.account.name} with privileges "{object.application.account.privileges}" while working in Designer mode on host {event_src.host}
A user created new user {object.application.account.name} while working in Designer mode on host {event_src.host}
